summary: Address Greptile review: type-safe 404 detection (errors.As + APIError.StatusCode), exclude {"success":false} error envelopes from creator-find presence, and remove the non-functional trends-triangulate --days flag.
reason: isNotFoundErr matched the literal client error string 'HTTP 404' (brittle to client error-format changes); creator find's len(pr.data)>2 presence heuristic read a 200 error-envelope as 'exists'; trends triangulate's --days flag was parsed and recorded but never passed to the search endpoints, implying time-bounding it does not perform.
validated_outcome: go build ./... and go test -race ./internal/... pass; creator find and trends triangulate verified live; --days now rejected as unknown flag.
